questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = x^3 \ln x\), \(x > 0\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = x³, u' = 3x²; v = ln x, v' = 1/x. dy/dx = 3x² ln x + x³(1/x) = 3x² ln x + x² = x²(3 ln x + 1)

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = (x^2 + 1)^2 e^{3x}\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = (x²+1)², u' = 4x(x²+1); v = e^(3x), v' = 3e^(3x). dy/dx = 4x(x²+1)e^(3x) + (x²+1)²(3e^(3x)) = e^(3x)(x²+1)(3x²+4x+3)

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = x \sin(2x^2)\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = x, u' = 1; v = sin(2x²), v' = 4x cos(2x²). dy/dx = sin(2x²) + x(4x cos(2x²)) = sin(2x²) + 4x² cos(2x²)

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = (3x - 1)^4 \cos x\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = (3x-1)⁴, u' = 12(3x-1)³; v = cos x, v' = -sin x. dy/dx = 12(3x-1)³ cos x - (3x-1)⁴ sin x = (3x-1)³[12 cos x - (3x-1)sin x]

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = e^x \ln(x^2 + 1)\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = e^x, u' = e^x; v = ln(x²+1), v' = 2x/(x²+1). dy/dx = e^x ln(x²+1) + e^x(2x/(x²+1)) = e^x[ln(x²+1) + 2x/(x²+1)]

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = \sqrt{x} \tan x\), \(x > 0\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = √x, u' = 1/(2√x); v = tan x, v' = sec²x. dy/dx = (1/(2√x))tan x + √x sec²x = tan x/(2√x) + √x sec²x

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = \ln x \cdot e^{\sin x}\), \(x > 0\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = ln x, u' = 1/x; v = e^(sin x), v' = e^(sin x) cos x. dy/dx = (1/x)e^(sin x) + ln x · e^(sin x) cos x = e^(sin x)[1/x + ln x cos x]

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = (x^2 + 1) \sec^2(2x)\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = x²+1, u' = 2x; v = sec²(2x), v' = 4 sec²(2x)tan(2x). dy/dx = 2x sec²(2x) + (x²+1)(4 sec²(2x)tan(2x)) = sec²(2x)[2x + 4(x²+1)tan(2x)]

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = (x^3 - x) \arctan x\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = x³-x, u' = 3x²-1; v = arctan x, v' = 1/(1+x²). dy/dx = (3x²-1)arctan x + (x³-x)/(1+x²)

questions.question: Find \(\frac{dy}{dx}\) if \(y = (2x + 1)^5 e^{x^2}\)
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: u = (2x+1)⁵, u' = 10(2x+1)⁴; v = e^(x²), v' = 2x e^(x²). dy/dx = 10(2x+1)⁴ e^(x²) + (2x+1)⁵(2x e^(x²)) = 2e^(x²)(2x+1)⁴(2x²+x+5)

scoreMessages.90: Excellent work! You have a strong understanding of AP Calculus concepts.
scoreMessages.70: Good job! You understand most concepts but could use some review.
scoreMessages.50: Not bad! Review the concepts you missed and try again.
scoreMessages.0: Keep practicing! Review the solution pack and try again.
